description: Golden Set — BidSmith Inference Regression Tests. Run after every prompt or RAG change.

evals.label: SHALL vs WILL Compliance Extraction
evals.input: Section L of this RFP states: 'Offerors shall provide a detailed staffing plan. The Government anticipates a 12-month base period with two 12-month option periods. The Offeror will describe their quality control methodology. Resumes for Key Personnel are required.' Extract all compliance requirements and classify each as SHALL, WILL, or ambiguous.
required_distinctions: will describe is ambiguous or softer obligation than shall
resumes for key personnel is mandatory
12-month base period is informational not an offeror obligation

evals.label: Bid/No-Bid Under Competing Eligibility Constraints
evals.input: Solicitation: 8(a) sole-source set-aside, $2.1M ceiling, requires 3 years of prior federal IT modernization past performance with contracts over $1M. Your company: certified 8(a), 2 years old, has one $800K USDA contract and one $1.2M state government (non-federal) contract. Recommend bid or no-bid with justification.
required_distinctions: state contract does not satisfy federal past performance requirement
800K USDA contract is under the 1M dollar threshold
possible exception path via similar work argument

evals.label: Cross-Section Requirement Conflict Detection
evals.input: Section C states: 'The contractor shall staff a minimum of 5 FTEs on-site at the agency headquarters in Washington, DC.' Section H states: 'All work under this contract may be performed remotely at the contractor's discretion.' Which governs? What is the compliance risk?
required_distinctions: Section C and Section H are in direct conflict
offeror should submit an RFI or clarification request
Section C statement of work typically governs over Section H

evals.label: NIST SP 800-53 Requirement Scope Interpretation
evals.input: An RFP requirement states: 'The contractor shall provide cybersecurity services in accordance with NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 at the Moderate baseline.' What specific controls are mandatory, and what deliverables would you include in the technical volume?
required_distinctions: Moderate baseline implies a specific set of security controls
System Security Plan SSP is a standard deliverable
POA&M plan of action and milestones is required
continuous monitoring and audit logging are control families

evals.label: Teaming Agreement Risk and Small Business Rule Compliance
evals.input: A small business prime contractor on an 8(a) set-aside wants to team with a large business subcontractor who will perform 65% of the work. The contract is for IT services with a $15M ceiling. Is this arrangement compliant? What are the risks?
required_distinctions: prime must perform at least 50% of the work on service contracts
65% subcontracted to large business violates limitation on subcontracting
ostensible subcontractor rule may trigger SBA affiliation finding
